results.title: Reviews: Easy Reports & Data Export - Build any report and automate exports with full control | Shopify App Store
results.content:
May 9, 2024

Easy report is vital to our store! Though there are minor issues here and there but the biggest perk is how responsive the team is to helping you out.

Rooniverse 戶戶送資源站

Hong Kong SAR

About 5 years using the app

January 6, 2025

I only generate a few reports a year so I don't need anything too robust but this app allows me to select all of the details I could possible imagine needing from my shop and I can custom make my own reports. the few times that I use it, it's very easy to use. I did run into a query I was stumped by and the creator responded within an hour. over all great app! I think I've been using it for two years and not needed any other reporting apps.

Sandmaiden Sleepwear

United States

Over 1 year using the app

November 13, 2023 [...] ##### Refine

 #### By rating

Edited May 7, 2026

This app was great until they ran an update and deleted my old reports. After reading my original review (bad) they reached out to me and fixed the problem they created. The acknowledge that there was a fault in their update and helped remake the lost report. Hurt for a couple days, but back on track. Used for a decade flawlessly. Hopefully no more updates, but they helped resolve the issue! Not often the case. I would recommend.

FLASHPOINT DESIGNS

United States

Almost 6 years using the app

June 10, 2026 [...] United States

Almost 6 years using the app

June 10, 2026

Very intuitive, efficient and completely reliable. Been using Easy Reports for a couple of years now and it is much more robust, easier to use and more flexible than the previous app we used.   
Highly recommend...our business depends on it and it has stood the test of time.

Whisky Tasting Co

United Kingdom

Over 2 years using the app

DevCloud LLC replied June 11, 2026

Thanks so much for this — really made our day! We've worked hard to make Easy Reports reliable and flexible for stores like yours, so knowing it's become something your business counts on means a lot. Thank you for sticking with us over the years, and for the recommendation. We're always here if you ever need a hand with a new report or export! 🙏

results.title: Easy App Reports - Reviews, News and Ratings
results.content:
# Easy App Reports

Build app dashboards with ease.

connect_once_explore_forever._1

Did you know you already have the KPIs and insights needed to grow your app? As incredibly as it seems, both Google Play and the App Store offer that. The bad news is that it’s all on their APIs.

But don’t worry, we got you. Easy App Reports handle all the technical stuff so you can have your app’s data on a nice and clean dashboard so you can focus on what really matters: interpreting the data to grow your app. Now, apps and games from 20 countries use our connectors daily.

### Here’s how companies like Mcdonald’s, Zalando, Brainly, and dozens of startups and scale-ups use it:

##

Easy App Reports

# Stop copy-pasting your App Store & Play Store data

Automatic sync for app teams who are done with manual reporting. Works with Looker Studio, BigQuery & AI Assistants.

Shop Titans
Marvel
Sygic
MásMóvil
99
Flight Tracker
Drops
Whitebook
BLW

Loved by 1,327 apps from 51 countries

## Cut countless hours of repetitive work in 3 steps

Connect your developer accounts and UA sources

### 1 / Connect your data

Link your Developer Accounts (as many as you need) and UA sources with a few clicks. No tech skills required.

Choose a destination — Looker Studio or BigQuery

### 2 / Choose a destination

Choose between our Looker Studio connectors or Google BigQuery to store and visualize your data.

Visualize your data with Magic Templates or AI [...] ### Use AI to get the most from your data

With Easy App Reports you can connect all your app's data with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any MCP-compatible AI.  
From there you can ask questions, generate reports, dashboards, run analysis, and more. All without building any dashboards or complicated SQL.  
Our MCP integration is available on all our base plans.

Compatible AI assistants

### Acquisition metrics? We've got you.

Beyond having all the acquisition metrics from the stores, you'll get plenty of breakdowns for every need:  
  
Traffic Source / Source Type  
App Version and Device  
Page Type and Title (App Store)  
Search Term and UTM (Google Play)  
Daily, Weekly and Monthly aggregation and more!

Detailed download and acquisition metrics
